master_plan.worker_prompt: Add classify_opponent_style() to opponent.py, import and use it in strategy.py, fix AKs all-in threshold from 0.55 to 0.70, widen preflop ranges, recalibrate EQR values

reviewer_feedback: REJECT: `classify_opponent_style()` is dead code. The function is imported and called at line 321 (`style_deltas = classify_opponent_style(opponent_model)`), but `style_deltas` is NEVER referenced anywhere else in strategy.py or any other file. The return dict contains `bluff_freq_bonus`, `call_threshold_delta`, and `fold_threshold_delta` — none of which affect any decision. The Master explicitly instructed to 'import and use it in strategy.py', but only the import/call was done, not the integration. Fix required: integrate `style_deltas` into the decision logic. The most natural approach is to add style_deltas to the threshold calculations alongside anti_bot4 adjustments — for example: (1) After line 442 where `strong -= anti_bot4['call_threshold_delta']`, also apply `strong += style_deltas['call_threshold_delta']` and similarly for medium. (2) Add `style_deltas['bluff_freq_bonus']` to the bluff threshold calculations at lines 682-684. (3) Apply `style_deltas['fold_threshold_delta']` where fold decisions are made. The opponent style classification logic itself (nit/maniac/station/fold_heavy) is sound — the integration just needs to be wired up.

review.change_summary: Added opponent style classification (nit/maniac/station/fold_heavy) to opponent.py but failed to integrate it into strategy decisions (dead code). Also widened preflop ranges (SB open 0.49→0.44, BB iso 0.57→0.52), added premium hand all-in auto-call (preflop_strength ≥0.70), and recalibrated EQR values downward for weak holdings with a new large-bet penalty.
risk_areas: style_deltas is dead code — opponent style classification has zero strategic impact
Preflop range widening (SB open 0.44, limp fold 0.29) could lead to playing too many weak hands from early position
EQR reduction for air hands (0.72→0.65 IP, 0.62→0.53 OOP) is aggressive — may cause over-folding in marginal spots
postflop.py at 995 lines is at the edge of the 1000-line limit
